scripts.install:conda: PYTHON=$(conda run -n yaaia-build which python) npm install && PYTHON=$(conda run -n yaaia-build which python) node node_modules/@electron/rebuild/lib/cli.js
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run build:vm && npm run build:vm-agent && npm run build:ollama && mkdir -p dist-electron/resources && cp -f resources/icon.png resources/YaaiaVM resources/yaaia-vm-agent dist-electron/resources/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -rf resources/ollama dist-electron/resources/ 2>/dev/null || true && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:vm: cd yaaia-vm && swift build -c release 2>/dev/null && cp -f .build/arm64-apple-macosx/release/YaaiaVM ../resources/ && codesign --force --sign - --entitlements YaaiaVM.entitlements ../resources/YaaiaVM || true
scripts.build:vm-agent: cd yaaia-vm-agent && GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -o yaaia-vm-agent . && mkdir -p "$HOME/yaaia/storage/shared" && cp -f yaaia-vm-agent "$HOME/yaaia/storage/shared/" && cp -f yaaia-vm-agent ../resources/
